sections.instruction: Questions 1-5: Answer the questions below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS OR A NUMBER. Questions 6-10: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

sections.instruction: Questions 11-16: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 17-20: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

questions.content: The food festival takes place
options: A at the beginning of April
B at the end of April
C in the middle of March

questions.content: The East Asian section will feature cuisine from
The Latin American section will have
Besides food tasting, there will also be
options: C events that show people how to cook

questions.content: For a list of events, people can
options: B look them up on the internet

questions.content: The speaker highly recommends that participants
options: C register in advance for workshops

sections.instruction: Questions 21-24: Choose FOUR letters A-G. Question 25: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 26-30: Complete the schedule below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

questions.content: Which FOUR of the following are required of student teachers?
options: C meetings with other student teachers

questions.content: Who has to sign the agreement form?

sections.instruction: Questions 31-32: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 33-40: Complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.
sections.passage_or_context:
Crowdfunding explained
• The project and financial target are explained on the crowdfunding website
• Each fundraising initiative has a set (33) {{BLANK}} limit
• For a film people could expect anything from free tickets to having their name listed in the (34) {{BLANK}}

Crowdfunding opportunities
• Companies can receive small donations from a(n) (35) {{BLANK}} of people
• Partner companies can help as part of their own fundraising events
• You can get (36) {{BLANK}} from supporters during the development phase
• Crowdfunding will increase (37) {{BLANK}} of the product and potentially improve sales

Crowdfunding dangers
• You must reach your target or donations are (38) {{BLANK}}
• It can take a lot of time to fulfil the promises you have made to fans
• Don’t forget to consider the cost of (39) {{BLANK}} when working out profits
• Raising awareness is hard if your company is (40) {{BLANK}} or if you don’t have many social media followers
